headline: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Prices Rise As Iran Talks Shelved; Apple, Amazon, Google Lead Earnings
summary: The stock market is at highs but results and spending for Apple, Amazon, Google and more will be key. Iran talks were called off.

headline: Is Seagate Technology Holdings plc (STX) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is STX a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Seagate Technology Holdings plc on r/AIPortfolios by manojs. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on STX. Seagate Technology Holdings plc’s share was trading at $539.75 as of April 20th. STX’s trailing and forward P/E were 61.89 and 30.58 respectively according to Yahoo […]
